path: APMCM25/2025 APMCM Problems/2025 APMCM Problems C/Tariff Data/td-fields.pdf
text:
# Page 1^page=1
USITC Tariff Database Fields Item Description HTS8 8-digit HTS number (the legal tariff line) BRIEF_DESCRIPTION Abbreviated product description (maximum of 150 characters and not legally binding or exhaustive) QUANTITY_1_CODE Abbreviation code of first unit of quantity—go to https://dataweb.usitc.gov/tariff/annual and click on “Code Key” link. QUANTITY_2_CODE Abbreviation code of second unit of quantity —go to https://dataweb.usitc.gov/tariff/annual and click on “Code Key” link. WTO_BINDING_CODE B=Bound U=Unbound MFN_TEXT_RATE MFN duty rate in text format MFN_RATE_TYPE_CODE Duty code for tariff calculation—go to https://dataweb.usitc.gov/tariff/annual and click on “Code Key” link. MFN_AVE Not used MFN_AD_VAL_RATE Ad valorem portion of the MFN duty rate (.05 = 5%) MFN_SPECIFIC_RATE Specific portion of the MFN duty rate (.05 = $.05 per unit of quantity) MFN_OTHER_RATE Additional portion of the MFN duty rate (.05 =$.05 per unit of quantity) COL1_SPECIAL_TEXT Column 1 special tariff preference programs in text format COL1_SPECIAL_MOD Not used GSP_INDICATOR A= GSP for all eligible beneficiary countries, A*= certain countries excluded from GSP, A+=GSP for imports from least- developed beneficiary countries only GSP_CTRY_EXCLUDED ISO code for country excluded from GSP for that item APTA_INDICATOR B= eligible for Automotive Products Trade Act (APTA) tariff preferences (duty-free) CIVIL_AIR_INDICATOR C= eligible for tariff preferences under the Agreement on Trade in Civil Aircraft (duty-free) NAFTA_CANADA_IND CA=eligible for NAFTA_CANADA tariff preferences (duty-free) NAFTA_MEXICO_IND MX= eligible for NAFTA_MEXICO tariff preferences MEXICO_RATE_TYPE_CODE Duty code for tariff calculation—go to https://dataweb.usitc.gov/tariff/annual and click on “Code Key” link. MEXICO_AD_VAL_RATE Ad valorem portion of the NAFTA-Mexico duty rate (.05 = 5%) MEXICO_SPECIFIC_RATE Specific portion of the NAFTA-Mexico duty rate (.05 = $.05 per unit of quantity) CBI_INDICATOR E= eligible for Caribbean Basin Initiative (CBI) tariff preferences, E*= certain products OR certain countries excluded from preference CBI_AD_VAL_RATE Ad valorem portion of the CBI duty rate (.05 = 5%)

# Page 2^page=2
Item Description CBI_SPECIFIC_RATE Specific portion of the CBI duty rate (.05 = $.05 per unit of quantity) AGOA_INDICATOR D= eligible for African Growth and Opportunity Act (AGOA) tariff preferences (duty-free) CBTPA_INDICATOR R= eligible for Caribbean Basin Trade Partnership Act (CBTPA) tariff preferences CBTPA_RATE_TYPE_CODE Duty code for tariff calculation—go to https://dataweb.usitc.gov/tariff/annual and click on “Code Key” link. CBTPA_AD_VAL_RATE Ad valorem portion of the CBTPA duty rate (.05 = 5%) CBTPA_SPECIFIC_RATE Specific portion of the CBTPA duty rate (.05 = $.05 per unit of quantity) ISRAEL_FTA_INDICATOR IL=eligible for Israel-United States Free Trade Agreement tariff preference (duty-free) ATPA_INDICATOR J=eligible for Andean Trade Preference Act (ATPA) tariff preference, J*= certain products excluded. Program has expired. ATPA_AD_VAL_RATE Ad valorem portion of the ATPA duty rate (.05 = 5%). Program has expired. ATPA_SPECIFIC_RATE Specific portion of the ATPA duty rate (.05 = $.05 per unit of quantity). Program has expired. ATPDEA_INDICATOR J+= eligible for Andean Trade Promotion and Drug Eradication Act tariff preference (ATPDEA). Program has expired. JORDAN _INDICATOR JO= eligible for Jordan FTA tariff preference JORDAN_RATE_TYPE_CODE Duty code for tariff calculation—go to https://dataweb.usitc.gov/tariff/annual and click on “Code Key” link. JORDAN _AD_VAL_RATE Ad valorem portion of the Jordan duty rate (.05 = 5%) JORDAN _SPECIFIC_RATE Specific portion of the Jordan duty rate (.05 = $.05 per unit of quantity) JORDAN _OTHER_RATE Additional portion of the Jordan duty rate (.05 =$.05 per unit of quantity) SINGAPORE _INDICATOR SG= eligible for Singapore FTA tariff preference SINGAPORE_RATE_TYPE_CODE Duty code for tariff calculation—go to https://dataweb.usitc.gov/tariff/annual and click on “Code Key” link. SINGAPORE _AD_VAL_RATE Ad valorem portion of the Singapore duty rate (.05 = 5%) SINGAPORE _SPECIFIC_RATE Specific portion of the Singapore duty rate (.05 = $.05 per unit of quantity) SINGAPORE _OTHER_RATE Additional portion of the Singapore duty rate (.05 =$.05 per unit of quantity) CHILE _INDICATOR CL= eligible for Chile FTA tariff preference CHILE_RATE_TYPE_CODE Duty code for tariff calculation—go to https://dataweb.usitc.gov/tariff/annual and click on “Code Key” link. CHILE _AD_VAL_RATE Ad valorem portion of the Chile duty rate (.05 = 5%) CHILE _SPECIFIC_RATE Specific portion of the Chile duty rate (.05 = $.05 per unit of quantity)

# Page 3^page=3
Item Description CHILE _OTHER_RATE Additional portion of the Chile duty rate (.05 =$.05 per unit of quantity) MOROCCO_INDICATOR MA= eligible for Morocco FTA tariff preference MOROCCO_RATE_TYPE_CODE Duty code for tariff calculation—go to https://dataweb.usitc.gov/tariff/annual and click on “Code Key” link. MOROCCO_AD_VAL_RATE Ad valorem portion of the Morocco duty rate (.05 = 5%) MOROCCO_SPECIFIC_RATE Specific portion of the Morocco duty rate (.05 = $.05 per unit of quantity) MOROCCO_OTHER_RATE Additional portion of the Morocco duty rate (.05 =$.05 per unit of quantity) AUSTRALIA_INDICATOR AU= eligible for Australia FTA tariff preference AUSTRALIA_RATE_TYPE_CODE Duty code for tariff calculation—go to https://dataweb.usitc.gov/tariff/annual and click on “Code Key” link. AUSTRALIA_AD_VAL_RATE Ad valorem portion of the Australia duty rate (.05 = 5%) AUSTRALIA_SPECIFIC_RATE Specific portion of the Australia duty rate (.05 = $.05 per unit of quantity) AUSTRALIA_OTHER_RATE Additional portion of the Australia duty rate (.05 =$.05 per unit of quantity) BAHRAIN _INDICATOR BH= eligible for Bahrain FTA tariff preference BAHRAIN_RATE_TYPE_CODE Duty code for tariff calculation—go to https://dataweb.usitc.gov/tariff/annual and click on “Code Key” link. BAHRAIN _AD_VAL_RATE Ad valorem portion of the Bahrain duty rate (.05 = 5%) BAHRAIN _SPECIFIC_RATE Specific portion of the Bahrain duty rate (.05 = $.05 per unit of quantity) BAHRAIN _OTHER_RATE Additional portion of the Bahrain duty rate (.05 =$.05 per unit of quantity) DR_CAFTA _INDICATOR P= eligible for Dominican Republic and Central America (DR- CAFTA) FTA tariff preference DR_CAFTA_RATE_TYPE_CODE Duty code for tariff calculation—go to https://dataweb.usitc.gov/tariff/annual and click on “Code Key” link. DR_CAFTA _AD_VAL_RATE Ad valorem portion of the DR-CAFTA duty rate (.05 = 5%) DR_CAFTA _SPECIFIC_RATE Specific portion of the DR-CAFTA duty rate (.05 = $.05 per unit of quantity) DR_CAFTA _OTHER_RATE Additional portion of the DR-CAFTA duty rate (.05 =$.05 per unit of quantity) DR_CAFTA _PLUS_INDICATOR P+= eligible for Dominican Republic and Central America Plus (DR-CAFTA PLUS) FTA tariff preference DR_CAFTA_PLUS_RATE_TYPE_CODE Duty code for tariff calculation—go to https://dataweb.usitc.gov/tariff/annual and click on “Code Key” link. DR_CAFTA _PLUS_AD_VAL_RATE Ad valorem portion of the DR-CAFTA PLUS duty rate (.05 = 5%) DR_CAFTA _PLUS_SPECIFIC_RATE Specific portion of the DR-CAFTA PLUS duty rate (.05 = $.05 per unit of quantity)

# Page 4^page=4
Item Description DR_CAFTA _PLUS_OTHER_RATE Additional portion of the DR-CAFTA PLUS duty rate (.05 =$.05 per unit of quantity) OMAN_INDICATOR OM = eligible for Oman FTA tariff preference OMAN_RATE_TYPE_CODE Duty code for tariff calculation—go to https://dataweb.usitc.gov/tariff/annual and click on “Code Key” link. OMAN_AD_VAL_RATE Ad valorem portion of the Oman duty rate (.05 = 5%) OMAN_SPECIFIC_RATE Specific portion of the Oman duty rate (.05 = $.05 per unit of quantity) OMAN_OTHER_RATE Additional portion of the Oman duty rate (.05 =$.05 per unit of quantity) PERU_INDICATOR PE = eligible for Peru FTA tariff preference PERU_RATE_TYPE_CODE Duty code for tariff calculation—go to https://dataweb.usitc.gov/tariff/annual and click on “Code Key” link. PERU_AD_VAL_RATE Ad valorem portion of the Peru duty rate (.05 = 5%) PERU_SPECIFIC_RATE Specific portion of the Peru duty rate (.05 = $.05 per unit of quantity) PERU_OTHER_RATE Additional portion of the Peru duty rate (.05 =$.05 per unit of quantity) PHARMACEUTICAL_IND K=eligible for tariff preference under the Agreement on Trade in Pharmaceutical Products (duty-free) DYES_INDICATOR L=eligible for tariff preference under the Uruguay Round concessions on Intermediate Chemicals for for Dyes (duty-free) COL2_TEXT_RATE Column 2 duty rates in text format COL2_RATE_TYPE_CODE Duty code for Column 2 tariff calculation--see "Tariff Database- Description and Codes" for equations COL2_AD_VAL_RATE Ad valorem portion of the Column 2 duty rate (.05 = 5%) COL2_SPECIFIC_RATE Specific portion of the Column 2 duty rate (.05 = $.05 per unit of quantity) COL2_OTHER_RATE Additional portion of the Column 2 duty rate (.05 = $.05 per unit of quantity) BEGIN_EFFECT_DATE Beginning effective date for any change in the fields for the tariff line END_EFFECTIVE_DATE Ending effective date for a change in at least one field for this tariff line. A date of 12/31/2050 indicates that there is currently no change scheduled. FOOTNOTE_COMMENT Footnote/Comment ADDITIONAL_DUTY Whether the duty is cumulative (in addition to the applicable rates in chapters 1-97) or not KOREA_INDICATOR KR = eligible for Korea FTA tariff preference KOREA_RATE_TYPE_CODE Duty code for tariff calculation—go to https://dataweb.usitc.gov/tariff/annual and click on “Code Key” link. KOREA_AD_VAL_RATE Ad valorem portion of the Korea duty rate (.05 = 5%) KOREA_SPECIFIC_RATE Specific portion of the Korea duty rate (.05 = $.05 per unit of quantity)

# Page 5^page=5
Item Description KOREA_OTHER_RATE Additional portion of the Korea duty rate (.05 =$.05 per unit of quantity) COLOMBIA_INDICATOR CO = eligible for Colombia FTA tariff preference COLOMBIA_RATE_TYPE_CODE Duty code for tariff calculation—go to https://dataweb.usitc.gov/tariff/annual and click on “Code Key” link. COLOMBIA_AD_VAL_RATE Ad valorem portion of the Colombia duty rate (.05 = 5%) COLOMBIA_SPECIFIC_RATE Specific portion of the Colombia duty rate (.05 = $.05 per unit of quantity) COLOMBIA_OTHER_RATE Additional portion of the Colombia duty rate (.05 =$.05 per unit of quantity) PANAMA_INDICATOR PA = eligible for Panama FTA tariff preference PANAMA_RATE_TYPE_CODE Duty code for tariff calculation—go to https://dataweb.usitc.gov/tariff/annual and click on “Code Key” link. PANAMA_AD_VAL_RATE Ad valorem portion of the Panama duty rate (.05 = 5%) PANAMA_SPECIFIC_RATE Specific portion of the Panama duty rate (.05 = $.05 per unit of quantity) PANAMA_OTHER_RATE Additional portion of the Panama duty rate (.05 =$.05 per unit of quantity) NEPAL_INDICATOR NP=eligible for the Nepal Preference Program JAPAN_INDICATOR JP = eligible for Trade Agreement Between the United States and Japan JAPAN_RATE_TYPE_CODE Duty code for tariff calculation—go to https://dataweb.usitc.gov/tariff/annual and click on “Code Key” link. JAPAN_AD_VAL_RATE Ad valorem portion of the Japan duty rate (.05 = 5%) JAPAN_SPECIFIC_RATE Specific portion of the Japan duty rate (.05 = $.05 per unit of quantity) JAPAN_OTHER_RATE Additional portion of the Japan duty rate (.05 =$.05 per unit of quantity) USMCA_INDICATOR S or S+ = eligible for Trade Agreement Between the United States and Japan USMCA_RATE_TYPE_CODE Duty code for tariff calculation—go to https://dataweb.usitc.gov/tariff/annual and click on “Code Key” link. USMCA_AD_VAL_RATE Ad valorem portion of the USMCA duty rate (.05 = 5%) USMCA_SPECIFIC_RATE Specific portion of the USMCA duty rate (.05 = $.05 per unit of quantity) USMCA_OTHER_RATE Additional portion of the USMCA duty rate (.05 =$.05 per unit of quantity)
